data.body: c366 (new-occasional-noolbenger) IMPLEMENTED + committed 37ab727 as stack bottom: completion_floor_active=true in rebar.toml, Monitoring section in docs/calibration/completion_floor.md, INFO log at drop site. RED->GREEN verified (flag False->True). Pre-flight: ruff clean, mypy clean, 42 completion-floor tests pass. Commit has Change-Id + DCO + rebar-ticket. Note: pre-commit hook flaked once (editable-install regenerated _build_info.py mid-commit + transient mypy PATH); retried clean. Review verdicts: 28f1/4cdf/7ed9/c366 PASS; d6bd BLOCK (E6/F1,T8 — remediate later). Claimed 28f1 next.
